changes: Escalate one_question_guard from warn to block to prevent compound questions
Add domain-pivot and oracle-redirect skill to reduce wasted turns
Add requirement category checklist to system prompt to improve style/content coverage
evolver_rationale: The dominant failure pattern is compound questions (5/9 turns) where the warn-level guard was ignored; escalating to block forces compliance. Domain-pivot and oracle-redirect failures (7 combined instances) waste turns on unproductive lines; a dedicated skill makes the pivot rule explicit. Style/content coverage at 0.333 reflects late or absent probing of those categories; adding a checklist and early-style priority in the system prompt addresses the systematic gap.
